sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55984" key="ka/togkos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάτογκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n55984.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bulky</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῷ σώματι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:117" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.117</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
